I'm reviewing a PR on the fix/bug-persistence branch. I need to verify the changes are correct by reading the current state of the modified files on main branch. Read these files to understand the baseline code:

1. src/main/session-store.ts - Focus on the saveWorkspace and loadConfig methods

3. src/main/mobile-server/routes/workspace.ts - Focus on the POST workspace route
4. src/renderer/components/beads/adapters/kspec-adapter.ts - Focus on the full class structure
5. src/main/mobile-server/websocket-manager.ts - Focus on broadcastPtyExit function
6. src/main/app/ipc-handlers/pty.ts - Focus on the spawn handler

For each file, note any potential issues with the code that the PR diff is fixing.

     3→import { join } from 'path'

     5→
     6→export interface ProjectCategory {
     7→  id: string

    19→  apiSessionMode?: 'existing' | 'new-keep' | 'new-close'  // How API requests handle sessions
    20→  apiModel?: 'default' | 'opus' | 'sonnet' | 'haiku'  // Model for API-triggered sessions
    21→  autoAcceptTools?: string[]  // Per-project tool patterns to auto-accept
    22→  permissionMode?: string     // Per-project permission mode

    57→}

    70→  terminalColors: {
    71→    black?: string
    72→    red?: string

    74→    yellow?: string
    75→    blue?: string

    80→}
    81→
    82→export interface Settings {
    83→  defaultProjectDir: string
    84→  theme: string
    85→  themeCustomization?: ThemeCustomization | null
    86→  voiceOutputEnabled?: boolean
    87→  voiceVolume?: number
    88→  voiceSpeed?: number
    89→  voiceSkipOnNew?: boolean
    90→  voiceSilenceThreshold?: number
    91→  autoAcceptTools?: string[]
    92→  permissionMode?: string
    93→  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider'
    94→}
    95→
    96→
    97→interface StoredData {
    98→  workspace: Workspace
    99→  windowBounds?: WindowBounds
   100→  settings?: Settings
   101→}
   102→
   103→export class SessionStore {
   104→  private configPath: string
   105→  private backupPath: string
   106→  private data: StoredData
   107→
   108→  constructor() {
   109→    const configDir = join(app.getPath('userData'), 'config')
   110→    if (!existsSync(configDir)) {
   111→      mkdirSync(configDir, { recursive: true })
   112→    }
   113→    this.configPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json')
   114→    this.backupPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json.backup')
   115→    this.data = this.load()
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  private loadFile(path: string): StoredData | null {
   119→    try {
   120→      if (!existsSync(path)) return null
   121→      const stat = statSync(path)
   122→      if (stat.size === 0) return null
   123→      const content = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
   124→      const data = JSON.parse(content)
   125→      if (!data?.workspace) return null
   126→      return data
   127→    } catch (e) {
   128→      console.error(`[SessionStore] Failed to load ${path}:`, e)
   129→      return null
   130→    }
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  private load(): StoredData {

   114→function handlePtyStreamUpgrade(
   115→  req: any,

   119→  deps: WebSocketManagerDeps

   124→    socket.write('HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found\r\n\r\n')

   127→  }
   128→
   129→  const streamWss = new WebSocketServer({ noServer: true })

   131→  streamWss.handleUpgrade(req, socket, head, (ws) => {
   132→    log('PTY stream connected', { ptyId })
   133→
   134→    const ptyStreams = deps.getPtyStreams()
   135→    if (!ptyStreams.has(ptyId)) {
   136→      ptyStreams.set(ptyId, new Set())
   137→    }
   138→    ptyStreams.get(ptyId)!.add(ws)
   139→
   140→    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'connected', ptyId }))
   141→
   142→    // Flush any buffered data
   143→    flushPtyBuffer(ptyId, ws, deps.getPtyDataBuffer())
   144→
   145→    ws.on('message', (message: Buffer) => {

   147→        const msg = JSON.parse(message.toString())
   148→
   149→        switch (msg.type) {
   150→          case 'input':
   151→            if (msg.data && ptyManager) {
   152→              ptyManager.write(ptyId, msg.data)
   153→            }
   154→            break
   155→
   156→          case 'resize':
   157→            if (msg.cols && msg.rows && ptyManager) {
   158→              ptyManager.resize(ptyId, msg.cols, msg.rows)
   159→            }
   160→            break
   161→
   162→          case 'ping':
   163→            ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   164→            break
   165→
   166→          default:
   167→            log('Unknown PTY stream message type', { type: msg.type, ptyId })
   168→        }
   169→      } catch (e) {
   170→        log('Invalid PTY stream message', { error: String(e), ptyId })
   171→      }
   172→    })

   174→    ws.on('close', () => {
   175→      log('PTY stream disconnected', { ptyId })
   176→      ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   177→      if (ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.size === 0) {
   178→        ptyStreams.delete(ptyId)
   179→      }
   180→    })

   182→    ws.on('error', (err) => {

   184→      ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   185→    })
   186→  })
   187→}
   188→
   189→function handleWebSocketMessage(ws: WebSocket, msg: any, deps: WebSocketManagerDeps): void {
   190→  const ptyManager = deps.getPtyManager()
   191→  const terminalSubscriptions = deps.getTerminalSubscriptions()
   192→
   193→  switch (msg.type) {
   194→    case 'subscribe':
   195→      if (msg.ptyId) {
   196→        if (!terminalSubscriptions.has(msg.ptyId)) {
   197→          terminalSubscriptions.set(msg.ptyId, new Set())
   198→        }
   199→        terminalSubscriptions.get(msg.ptyId)!.add(ws)
   200→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'subscribed', ptyId: msg.ptyId }))
   201→      }
   202→      break
   203→
   204→    case 'unsubscribe':
   205→      if (msg.ptyId) {
   206→        terminalSubscriptions.get(msg.ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   207→      }
   208→      break
   209→
   210→    case 'write':
   211→      if (msg.ptyId && msg.data && ptyManager) {
   212→        ptyManager.write(msg.ptyId, msg.data)
   213→      }
   214→      break
   215→
   216→    case 'resize':
   217→      if (msg.ptyId && msg.cols && msg.rows && ptyManager) {
   218→        ptyManager.resize(msg.ptyId, msg.cols, msg.rows)
   219→      }
   220→      break
   221→
   222→    case 'ping':
   223→      ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   224→      break
   225→  }
   226→}
   227→
   228→function flushPtyBuffer(ptyId: string, ws: WebSocket, ptyDataBuffer: Map<string, string[]>): void {
   229→  const buffer = ptyDataBuffer.get(ptyId)
   230→  if (!buffer || buffer.length === 0) return
   231→
   232→  buffer.forEach(data => {
   233→    if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   234→      ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'data', data }))
   235→    }
   236→  })
   237→
   238→  ptyDataBuffer.delete(ptyId)
   239→}
   240→
   241→function sendPendingFilesToClient(ws: WebSocket, pendingFiles: Map<string, PendingFile>): void {
   242→  const now = Date.now()
   243→  // Clean up expired files first
   244→  for (const [fileId, file] of pendingFiles) {
   245→    if (file.expiresAt < now) {
   246→      pendingFiles.delete(fileId)
   247→    }
   248→  }
   249→
   250→  const files = Array.from(pendingFiles.values()).map(f => ({
   251→    id: f.id,
   252→    name: f.name,
   253→    size: f.size,
   254→    mimeType: f.mimeType,
   255→    message: f.message
   256→  }))
   257→
   258→  if (files.length > 0) {
   259→    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'files:pending', files }))
   260→  }
   261→}
   262→
   263→export function broadcastTerminalData(
   264→  ptyId: string,
   265→  data: string,
   266→  terminalSubscriptions: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>
   267→): void {
   268→  const subscribers = terminalSubscriptions.get(ptyId)
   269→  if (!subscribers) return
   270→
   271→  const message = JSON.stringify({

   273→    ptyId,
   274→    data
   275→  })
   276→
   277→  subscribers.forEach(ws => {
   278→    if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   279→      ws.send(message)
   280→    }
   281→  })
   282→}
   283→
   284→export function broadcastPtyData(
   285→  ptyId: string,
   286→  data: string,
   287→  ptyStreams: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>,
   288→  ptyDataBuffer: Map<string, string[]>
   289→): void {
   290→  const streams = ptyStreams.get(ptyId)
   291→
   292→  // If no streams connected, buffer the data
   293→  if (!streams || streams.size === 0) {
   294→    if (!ptyDataBuffer.has(ptyId)) {

   296→    }
   297→    const buffer = ptyDataBuffer.get(ptyId)!
   298→    buffer.push(data)
   299→    // Limit buffer size
   300→    if (buffer.length > 1000) {
   301→      buffer.shift()
   302→    }
   303→    return
   304→  }
   305→
   306→  const message = JSON.stringify({
   307→    type: 'data',
   308→    data
   309→  })
   310→
   311→  streams.forEach(ws => {
   312→    if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   313→      ws.send(message)
   314→    }
   315→  })
   316→}
   317→
   318→export function broadcastPtyExit(
   319→  ptyId: string,
   320→  code: number,
   321→  ptyStreams: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>,
   322→  terminalSubscriptions?: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>
   323→): void {
   324→  const streams = ptyStreams.get(ptyId)
   325→  if (streams && streams.size > 0) {
   326→    const message = JSON.stringify({
   327→      type: 'exit',
   328→      code
   329→    })
   330→
   331→    streams.forEach(ws => {

   334→        ws.close(1000, 'PTY exited')
   335→      }
   336→    })
   337→  }
   338→
   339→  // Clean up stale subscriptions for this PTY
   340→  ptyStreams.delete(ptyId)
   341→  terminalSubscriptions?.delete(ptyId)
   342→}

   163→            ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   164→            break
   165→
   166→          default:
   167→            log('Unknown PTY stream message type', { type: msg.type, ptyId })
   168→        }
   169→      } catch (e) {
   170→        log('Invalid PTY stream message', { error: String(e), ptyId })
   171→      }
   172→    })
   173→
   174→    ws.on('close', () => {
   175→      log('PTY stream disconnected', { ptyId })
   176→      ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   177→      if (ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.size === 0) {
   178→        ptyStreams.delete(ptyId)
   179→      }
   180→    })
   181→
   182→    ws.on('error', (err) => {
   183→      log('PTY stream error', { error: String(err), ptyId })
   184→      ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   185→    })
   186→  })
   187→}
   188→
   189→function handleWebSocketMessage(ws: WebSocket, msg: any, deps: WebSocketManagerDeps): void {
   190→  const ptyManager = deps.getPtyManager()
   191→  const terminalSubscriptions = deps.getTerminalSubscriptions()
   192→
   193→  switch (msg.type) {
   194→    case 'subscribe':
   195→      if (msg.ptyId) {
   196→        if (!terminalSubscriptions.has(msg.ptyId)) {
   197→          terminalSubscriptions.set(msg.ptyId, new Set())
   198→        }
   199→        terminalSubscriptions.get(msg.ptyId)!.add(ws)
   200→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'subscribed', ptyId: msg.ptyId }))
   201→      }
   202→      break
   203→
   204→    case 'unsubscribe':
   205→      if (msg.ptyId) {
   206→        terminalSubscriptions.get(msg.ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   207→      }
   208→      break
   209→
   210→    case 'write':
   211→      if (msg.ptyId && msg.data && ptyManager) {
   212→        ptyManager.write(msg.ptyId, msg.data)
   213→      }
   214→      break
   215→
   216→    case 'resize':
   217→      if (msg.ptyId && msg.cols && msg.rows && ptyManager) {
   218→        ptyManager.resize(msg.ptyId, msg.cols, msg.rows)
   219→      }
   220→      break
   221→
   222→    case 'ping':
   223→      ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   224→      break
   225→  }
   226→}

   229→  const buffer = ptyDataBuffer.get(ptyId)
   230→  if (!buffer || buffer.length === 0) return
   231→
   232→  buffer.forEach(data => {
   233→    if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   234→      ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'data', data }))
   235→    }
   236→  })
   237→
   238→  ptyDataBuffer.delete(ptyId)
   239→}
   240→
   241→function sendPendingFilesToClient(ws: WebSocket, pendingFiles: Map<string, PendingFile>): void {
   242→  const now = Date.now()
   243→  // Clean up expired files first
   244→  for (const [fileId, file] of pendingFiles) {
   245→    if (file.expiresAt < now) {
   246→      pendingFiles.delete(fileId)
   247→    }
   248→  }
   249→
   250→  const files = Array.from(pendingFiles.values()).map(f => ({
   251→    id: f.id,
   252→    name: f.name,
   253→    size: f.size,
   254→    mimeType: f.mimeType,
   255→    message: f.message
   256→  }))
   257→
   258→  if (files.length > 0) {
   259→    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'files:pending', files }))
   260→  }
   261→}
   262→
   263→export function broadcastTerminalData(
   264→  ptyId: string,
   265→  data: string,
   266→  terminalSubscriptions: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>
   267→): void {
   268→  const subscribers = terminalSubscriptions.get(ptyId)
   269→  if (!subscribers) return
   270→
   271→  const message = JSON.stringify({
   272→    type: 'terminal-data',
   273→    ptyId,
   274→    data
   275→  })
   276→
   277→  subscribers.forEach(ws => {
   278→    if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   279→      ws.send(message)
   280→    }
   281→  })
   282→}
   283→
   284→export function broadcastPtyData(
   285→  ptyId: string,
   286→  data: string,
   287→  ptyStreams: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>,
   288→  ptyDataBuffer: Map<string, string[]>
   289→): void {
   290→  const streams = ptyStreams.get(ptyId)
   291→
   292→  // If no streams connected, buffer the data
   293→  if (!streams || streams.size === 0) {
   294→    if (!ptyDataBuffer.has(ptyId)) {
   295→      ptyDataBuffer.set(ptyId, [])
   296→    }
   297→    const buffer = ptyDataBuffer.get(ptyId)!
   298→    buffer.push(data)
   299→    // Limit buffer size
   300→    if (buffer.length > 1000) {
   301→      buffer.shift()
   302→    }
   303→    return
   304→  }
   305→
   306→  const message = JSON.stringify({
   307→    type: 'data',
   308→    data
   309→  })
   310→
   311→  streams.forEach(ws => {
   312→    if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   313→      ws.send(message)
   314→    }
   315→  })
   316→}
   317→
   318→export function broadcastPtyExit(
   319→  ptyId: string,
   320→  code: number,
   321→  ptyStreams: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>,
   322→  terminalSubscriptions?: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>
   323→): void {
   324→  const streams = ptyStreams.get(ptyId)
   325→  if (streams && streams.size > 0) {
   326→    const message = JSON.stringify({
   327→      type: 'exit',
   328→      code
   329→    })
   330→
   331→    streams.forEach(ws => {
   332→      if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   333→        ws.send(message)
   334→        ws.close(1000, 'PTY exited')
   335→      }
   336→    })
   337→  }
   338→
   339→  // Clean up stale subscriptions for this PTY
   340→  ptyStreams.delete(ptyId)
   341→  terminalSubscriptions?.delete(ptyId)
   342→}

**File path:** `/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/main/session-store.ts`
